title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.180 - Annual report of division, contents
text:
217.180.  Annual report of division, contents. — The division directors shall submit an annual report at the request of the director of the department.  Such report shall contain the information required and requested by the director.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 36, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408)
